protocol_A_train_F1_F4_F6.description: AUC=0.534, near-random; refutes hypothesis of held-out AUC>0.95

protocol_B_bootstrap_stratified_random.caveat: each split contains samples from every class; reflects within-class memorization, not GRH discrimination

leave_one_pair_out.description: AUC varies from 0 to 1 across holdouts; F9, F11 + non-GRH holdouts give AUC≈0

note: F13 (Maass form) excluded due to lack of pre-fetched LMFDB coefficients; F3, F8 (random controls) excluded as RH-status undefined.
